query:
INSERT INTO reservations (
  productId, productName, bookingDate, people,
  extrasJson, amountTotal, amountPaid, status,
  customerName, customerEmail, customerPhone,
  merchantOrder, notes, paymentMethod, channel,
  createdAt, updatedAt, paidAt
) VALUES (
  30002,
  'Banana Ski (+1 más)',
  '2026-03-25',
  2,
  '[{"productId":30002,"productName":"Banana Ski","quantity":1,"unitPrice":15,"participants":1},{"productId":30003,"productName":"Cableski & Wakeboard Dia Completo","quantity":1,"unitPrice":45,"participants":1}]',
  5100,
  5100,
  'paid',
  'Faustino',
  'jgrande@skicenter.es',
  NULL,
  'TPV-20260325-2402',
  '[ORIGEN_TPV] Ticket: TPV-20260325-2402 · Cliente: Faustino · Email: jgrande@skicenter.es · Productos: Banana Ski, Cableski & Wakeboard Dia Completo',
  'efectivo',
  'tpv',
  1774456399957,
  1774456399957,
  1774456399957
);
